name: Acolyte
description: Raised in a religious or philosophical order.

name: Artisan
description: Trained in a skilled craft and guild practice.

name: Charlatan
description: Expert in social manipulation and disguise.

name: Criminal
description: Connected to illicit networks and street survival.

name: Explorer
description: Experienced in travel, ruins, and wilderness routes.

name: Guard
description: Former watch or militia member with disciplined training.

name: Noble
description: Born to influence and entrenched social ties.

name: Outlander
description: Grew up beyond settled lands and city law.

name: Scholar
description: Academically trained in research and records.

name: Urchin
description: Survived urban hardship through adaptability and grit.
